catalog.title: Pinned roots · reload keeps pins · Back/Forward rewind (urlSync push)
A×F5 form grammar — the title IS the field; form cards abolished
Crumbbar utilities — bare theme icon at the right, repo link beside it, topbar decluttered
Dedicated space menus — the sidebar mirrors the OPEN space, with back arrow and root show/hide
Reference rail v2 — S-capped refs, scroll-to-leaf, removable chips, root-ref consume-on-resume
First-run auto-open · ⌘K indexes live stores · mobile dashboard switcher
Foundations — one foot-button family, fixed-position popovers, no native selects/pickers, no emoji chrome
Bundle diet — lazy heavy panel modules behind a store-only seam; trim icon mega-packs
Flat everything — doc cards, stats, drills, anat-rows and list rows lose their boxes (hairline grammar)
Root-close promotion — closing the root hands the lead to its child; the space ends at the last panel
Panel setups remembered, root-respecting deep-links, drill hover polish, no-dash copy
Separator dedup · neutral focus ring · resizable pinned refs
Tables v3 · Notion row peek · the entity sheet (pipeline pills, facets, activity)
Menu design v2 · XXL exact-width semantics · double-click panel align
Sidebar space KPIs (root mirror) + three-tier responsive shell
Panel search in the bar (flat row) + quiet secondary / destructive foot buttons
Workspace undo/redo (mod+Z) + table multi-select bulk bar + bar-driven row search
A11y baseline: aria-live toasts, arrow-key drill nav, overlay focus land/return
Action registry (foot = palette = bridge) + recent threads + saved layouts
Copilot bridge: window.stax drives the workspace (state + intents + registry actions)
